case_title: KANBAYASHI, ATSUSHI et al VS CHOY, PETER et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-17-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-30-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO PAY JUDGEMENT TO COURT RETURNED. CHECK AMOUNT IS ONLY $407. TOTAL JUDGEMENT IS $498.19 AND NEEDS $20 FOR FEE. INFORMED TO ISSUE 2 CHECKS.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
